evidence.description: The 2010–2012 nuclear scientist assassination campaign was initiated under Dagan's leadership of the Mossad. The campaign began in January 2010 with the killing of Masoud Ali Mohammadi and continued through Dagan's tenure, with further attacks in November 2010 targeting Majid Shahriari and Fereydoun Abbasi-Davani.

evidence.source_title: Meir Dagan, Mossad Spy Chief Who Pioneered Covert War Against Iran, Dies at 71
evidence.description: Dagan is widely credited with designing and executing the covert campaign against Iran's nuclear programme, including the assassination programme targeting Iranian nuclear scientists.

editorial_notes: Attribution is widely alleged but not officially confirmed by Israel. Dagan directed the early phase of the campaign (2010 – Jan 2011); Tamir Pardo continued it after January 2011.
